Player Newslog

  • Chris Paul’s knee fracture is healing properly and will be returning to the field next week.
    January 19, 2016
  • Chris Paul has a knee fracture and he’s gonna be out of the play for 4 months.
    September 26, 2016
  • Chris Paul is now the 1st Shooting Guard after being 3rd Shooting Guard for the past year.
    September 6, 2016
  • Chris Paul has an abductor strain so he will miss the next game against the LA Pirates.
    March 4, 2016
  • Chris Paul has an abductor strain so he will miss the next game against the LA Pirates.
    March 4, 2016
  • Chris Paul won the Player of the Year 2014 Award for the first time.
    August 17, 2015
  • Chris Paul has a lower back contusion and will miss the next two games.
    August 5, 2015
  • Chris Paul has joined the team after playing for the California Surfers for a year.
    June 19, 2013
